summary: Replay ADR 0368 from the latest realistic 0.178.137 origin/main base, repair the exact-main Redpanda readiness bug and shared-worktree scan-receipt path handling uncovered during the governed replay, and verify MinIO, Gitea, Redpanda, check-build-server, and remote-validate end to end before the final mainline merge.

verification.observed: The ws-0368 focused pytest slice passed with 46 tests across the Gitea, MinIO, Redpanda, service-definition-catalog, SBOM, and image-upgrade surfaces.
agent-standards, service-definitions, health-probes, data-models, and workstream-surfaces all passed on the ws-0368 worktree.
The governed MinIO replay completed on docker-runtime with ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true, and direct MinIO live and ready probes passed afterwards.

The governed Gitea replay completed on runtime-control with ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true, and the private version endpoint, swagger document, and release-bundle signature validation all succeeded afterwards.

The first replay exposed a stale readiness probe that always read offset=0. After repairing the service catalog and generated health-probe bundle to read back from the produced offset, the governed Redpanda replay completed successfully and direct Kafka plus schema-registry verification passed.
check-build-server confirmed SSH connectivity, the remote workspace path, and immutable snapshot dry-run upload from the ws-0368 worktree.

The remote builder leg failed to resolve registry.example.com for the validation runner images, but the governed local fallback reran every unresolved blocking check locally and all ten blocking checks passed.

notes: The replay started from origin/main@6aeb26434724680c6da2162cd3544031b5a93f03, the latest realistic 0.178.137 mainline base visible from this controller at apply time.
Immutable guest mutation was acknowledged explicitly for the MinIO, Gitea, and Redpanda service replays via ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true.
This receipt records the first truthful platform application of ADR 0368. Protected integration files still wait for the final merge-to-main replay.
